text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru… Thank you for reading
my fortune the other day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, the pleasure was mine! Did you
succeed in obtaining the lucky item we
divined? A picture of the full moon?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
After some effort, I think I finally got one.
Please have a look.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh… I've never seen such a radiant moon!
…Wait, isn't this a picture of the sun?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It seems she did see the full moon.
But she forgot to take a picture before bed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's right. As soon as I realized my
mistake, I hurried to take a photograph
as quickly as I could!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But you hurried after the moon was gone…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I spotted her on my way to morning training,
desperately pointing her camera at the sun.
It was a surreal sight to be sure…

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Still, maybe this is just me, but… I seem to
sense an aura of great happiness around
Bright, even though she missed out on her
lucky item.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's because of Dober's peach tea.
We drank it together while watching the sun
rise, and it was the most magical experience.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Stop exaggerating. It's just tea — I'll make
you some whenever you want.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah, so it was the fragrance of a lucky drink! You must let me attend your next tea party!
